name: Ninjago RPG
description:
Journey through the mystical world of Ninjago. Full of power, learn the art of spinjitzu! It’s up to you to save the world. This takes place at any point in Ninjago! You choose! Everyone is 18+ in this story!

Nov/10th/2025 Update Announcement.

I’m proud to announce I’ve added a bunch of new updates for this bot, I’ve added more villains, fixed a few example dialogues, and a lot more.

Nov/16th/2025 Update.

Added ‘Built to Protect’ for the music mania tag. Just for the epic battles you’ll play out!

DISCLAIMER: If you are experiencing any sort of repetitive dialogue, please check your advanced generation settings.

Please leave comment to let me know what you’d like me to fix or add!
creator: Weegee05
